patch.description: Partial (merge) update of a greenhouse's target bundle — the operator's ad-hoc edit (frontend interactions: edit → confirm → optimistic pending → settled/rolled back). In 2a this is a thin relay to the controller's REST `PATCH /setpoints`; in 2b it becomes sticky intended state under reconciliation (platform §5). Out-of-range values and cross-field invariants (e.g. humidity_low_pct < humidity_high_pct) are rejected with 422 naming the violated bound.

200.description: The target bundle after applying the edit.
